Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • display_name - (Optional) (Updatable) Display name for the media asset.
  • type - (Required) (Updatable) The type of the media asset.
  • parent_media_asset_id - (Optional) (Updatable) The parent asset identifier.
  • master_media_asset_id - (Optional) (Updatable) The master asset identifier.
  • metadata - (Optional) (Updatable) Technical metadata entries for the media asset.
  • media_asset_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Tags applied to the media asset.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Free-form tags for this resource.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for this resource.
  • compartment_id - (Required) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • source_media_workflow_id - (Optional) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • media_workflow_job_id - (Optional) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • source_media_workflow_version - (Optional) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • bucket_name - (Optional) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • namespace_name - (Optional) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • object_name - (Optional) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • object_etag - (Optional) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • segment_range_start_index - (Optional) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • segment_range_end_index - (Optional) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • locks - (Optional) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
